TitleFontSource.Name: Title Font Source
TitleFontSource.Hint: Where to load the title font from.

GoogleFontFamily.Name: Title Google Font
GoogleFontFamily.Hint: Font family name as it appears on Google Fonts (e.g. 'Oswald', 'Alfa Slab One'). Bold weight is requested automatically.

FoundryFontFamily.Name: Title Foundry Font
FoundryFontFamily.Hint: Select from fonts installed in Foundry's Font Manager (includes Additional Fonts).

SubtitleFontSource.Name: Subtitle Font Source
SubtitleFontSource.Hint: Where to load the subtitle font from.

SubtitleGoogleFont.Name: Subtitle Google Font
SubtitleGoogleFont.Hint: Font family name as it appears on Google Fonts. Used for subtitle lines 1 and 2.

SubtitleFoundryFont.Name: Subtitle Foundry Font
SubtitleFoundryFont.Hint: Select from fonts installed in Foundry's Font Manager. Used for subtitle lines 1 and 2.

SoundPath.Name: Impact Sound
SoundPath.Hint: Audio file played when the title card appears. Leave empty for no sound.

DisplayDuration.Name: Display Duration (ms)
DisplayDuration.Hint: How long the title card is shown, in milliseconds.

BackgroundColor.Name: Background Color
BackgroundColor.Hint: Hex color for the card background (e.g. #1db0f6).

BackgroundTexture.Name: Background Texture
BackgroundTexture.Hint: Image overlaid on the background color. Leave empty to disable.

TextureOpacity.Name: Texture Opacity (%)
TextureOpacity.Hint: How strongly the background texture shows through (0 = invisible, 100 = full).

TextColor.Name: Text Color
TextColor.Hint: Hex color for all title card text (e.g. #f5e642).

ZoomAmount.Name: Zoom Amount (%)
ZoomAmount.Hint: How far the card zooms in while displayed. 0 disables zoom.

TitleSizeVw.Name: Title Size (vw)
TitleSizeVw.Hint: Font size of the main title in viewport-width units (8–60). Larger = bigger text.

VerticalPosition.Name: Vertical Position (%)
VerticalPosition.Hint: Where the content sits vertically (0 = top, 50 = centre, 100 = bottom).

FadeDuration.Name: Fade Out Duration (ms)
FadeDuration.Hint: How long the fade-out at the end takes. 0 disables the fade.

SubtitleSpacing.Name: Subtitle Spacing (vh)
SubtitleSpacing.Hint: Vertical gap between the title line and the subtitle block.

TitleScaleY.Name: Title Vertical Stretch
TitleScaleY.Hint: Stretches the title text vertically. 1.0 = normal, 2.0 = double height.

TitlePerspective.Name: Title Perspective (px)
TitlePerspective.Hint: Controls the strength of the 3D perspective taper. Lower values = more extreme taper.

TitleRotateX.Name: Title Tilt (degrees)
TitleRotateX.Hint: Tilts the top of the title away from the viewer, creating a trapezoid taper effect.

TitleArcDepth.Name: Title Arc Depth (%)
TitleArcDepth.Hint: How far the bottom of the title scoops inward as an arc. 0 = flat bottom.

VariantManager.Name: Variant Progression
VariantManager.Label: Manage Variants
VariantManager.Hint: Advance, reset, or set the current variant in the progression sequence.

Dialog.Title: Title
Dialog.Subtitle1Placeholder: BASED ON THE COMIC BOOK BY
Dialog.Subtitle2Placeholder: Robert Kirkman, Cory Walker, & Ryan Ottley
Dialog.MacroCopied: Hardcoded macro copied to clipboard. Paste it into a new Foundry macro.
Dialog.MacroCopyFailed: Could not copy to clipboard. Open the browser console to retrieve the macro.

Notifications.GMOnly: Only the GM can show a title card.

Errors.GMOnly: Only the GM can trigger the Title Card Uwu.
